errors.no_default_city: No city given and default_city is not set.
errors.city_not_found_all: Location not found by any provider.

help.body: Commands: weather [city] | погода [город] | time [city] | время [город] | ping | пинг | node [hex] | узел [hex] | help | помощь

node.bad_prefix: Provide a key hex prefix (at least {min_hex} symbols, i.e. 1 byte).

admin.msg_bad_format: Format: msg index:text (index must be in channels.enabled_indices).
